answers: Sleep hygiene: consistent schedule, dark cool room, no screens 1 hour before bed, no caffeine after 2pm, and comfortable mattress.
Tips: 7-9 hours per night, wake at same time daily (even weekends), avoid alcohol before bed, and exercise regularly.
Can't sleep: try 4-7-8 breathing, progressive muscle relaxation, or get up after 20 min and do something boring until sleepy.
Ghum valo kora: fixed time e shute jao, room andhokaar rakhho, phone dur e rakhho, ar relax koro shute jaowar age.
